title: What to know about tooth decay before using medicinal herbs
intro: Several herbal teas excel in fighting tooth decay due to their antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. For instance, lemon balm tea inhibits the growth of cavity-causing bacteria, while chamomile tea soothes inflamed gums and reduces pain. Additionally, clove tea, known for its potent antimicrobial qualities, combats harmful oral bacteria, preventing tooth decay. Lastly, sage tea, a natural antiseptic, effectively reduces plaque and promotes overall oral health.
definition: Tooth decay is the damage that occurs when bacteria in your mouth make acids that eat away at the protective enamel coating of your teeth, leading to cavities. This damage is irreversible and can result in pain, infection, and even tooth loss if left untreated. Good oral hygiene, including regular brushing and flossing, is essential to prevent tooth decay and maintain overall oral health, which is crucial for speaking, eating, and overall well-being.
